Request a demo

Educational Campuses

Safe campuses start with visible operations.

Educational campuses need security operations that are visible, accountable, and fast to respond. SYAG gives school and university security teams the tools to run a professional operation from a single platform.

Key use cases

Structured Visitor Access

Parents, contractors, delivery personnel, and event visitors all need structured access management. SYAG pre-registers authorised visitors and gives gate staff instant identity verification via QR code.

Patrol Verification

Large campus perimeters require regular patrol coverage. SYAG's checkpoint scanning system verifies that every patrol point has been visited on every shift — with automated alerts when patrols fall behind schedule.

Emergency Protocol Automation

Emergency situations — lockdowns, evacuations, medical incidents — require immediate and coordinated response. SYAG's Flow automation can trigger broadcast notifications to all guards and supervisors the moment an emergency is declared.

Incident Documentation

Every incident on a school campus must be documented for safeguarding, insurance, and regulatory purposes. SYAG's incident management system ensures every incident is recorded with full evidence, timestamps, and responsible officer.

See SYAG for your educational campus.

Request a demo →
